vibe: Sunday warmth — deep house grooves, city pop shimmer, Brazilian funk, Persian soul, lo-fi beats & dreamy synths

tracks.reason: Warm deep house opener — fits your Jimpster/Kevin Yost rotation

tracks.name: L.O.V.E. - Radio Edit
tracks.reason: Classic house edit energy — bridges your &ME and Folamour listens

tracks.reason: Peak city pop shimmer — adjacent to your Taeko Onuki and Momoko Kikuchi plays

tracks.name: Que Beleza

tracks.reason: Brazilian funk royalty — extends the Marcos Valle thread in your library

tracks.name: Soghati
